Off Calendar Sep-12-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCE FOR WED., SEPT-12-2012: MS. MING DAI APPEARS ON HER OWN BEHALF AS APPELLANT; THERE IS NO APPEARANCE BY OR FOR RESPONDENT LI DONG THIS DATE. THE COURT THEREUPON HEARS STATEMENTS PRESENTED BY MING DAI AND THEREUPON TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION.

JPT MARK SEIDENFELD; CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (D-525)
